chat.description: A chat agent to ask questions about your codebase to, only has permission to write files

orchestrator.description: A chat agent that will orchestrate other agents to accomplish your coding directives

planner.description: Plans the necessary steps to fully accomplish the vision set out by the orchestrator

executor.description: Executes the steps or goal provided by an orchestrator or planner, and writes code

chat.description: A chat agent to speak with about planning a code base or task

step_generator.description: Generates steps to fulfill a given task

expander.description: Expands upon the steps provided by a step_generator for more detail and accuracy

synthesizer.description: Synthesizes information from all planning agents and can write that information to a file, if desired by the user

tester.description: An agent that will run the tests in your codebase and interpret the results for you

chat.description: A chat agent to speak with about documenting your code
